series_metadata.series_description: These are old versions of rules enacted by the Ohio Department of Job and Family Services (ODJFS) to govern programs administered by ODJFS. These rules may have impacted county agencies, the public participating in ODJFS programs or applying to participate, or other entities that are affected by the actions of ODJFS in fulfilling its responsibilities. These obsolete versions of rules are no longer in effect because they have been eliminated or replaced by newer versions of the same rules.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: no longer Legal or Administrative value
